channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Thank You For You Application launches June 19th
item.content:encoded:
No More Robots and IceLemonTea Studio have revealed that Thank You For Your Application is going to be available on June 19th. Alongside the release date announcement, IceLemonTea has also released a brand new demo for Thank You For Your Application which has added controllor support and fixed some issues, as well adding a bit more content.

In Thank You For Your Application you play as a junior interviewer for Aeropolis, which is the biggest company in the world. Your job is to weed out the applicants that would not be a good fit for the company, and living your life under the company’s surveillance. You need to keep earning money to pay for things like company accomodation, otherwise you could be cast out. Robots can take the jobs of humans, and there is a dark secret to discover behind the success the world’s biggest company. The changelog for the new Thank You For Your Application is below.

[Added]

  1. Added a new section for interview manuals under the secondary panel;
  2. Added a new knowledge base section under the secondary panel;
  3. Added controller support;
  4. Added German and French localizations;
  5. Added New transition animations for the departure and appearance of interview candidates;
  6. Added afterwork animations;
  7. Added the option to adjust the game fonts;

[Adjustments]

  1. Optimized the game’s start menu;
  2. Optimized the UI of the secondary panel;
  3. Optimized the UI of the dialog box;
  4. Optimized some sound effects;
  5. Optimized the assets of the clock-in button;
  6. The working hours listed on the resume cannot be selected now.

[Fixes]

  1. Fixed the issue where, when selecting the recruitment requirements first and then the document field, the previously selected requirements would be deselected.
  2. Fixed some typos in the localized text.
  3. Fixed the issue where the reduction of breakdown index when quickly purchasing items did not work as expected;
  4. Fixed the issue where emails might display abnormally when loading the game.
  5. Fixed the issue where the interview dialog box scrolled too quickly.

Source: Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/05/22/thank-you-for-you-application-launches-june-19th/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
